subcodes.first_line: O kind brethren! Nazim is truly an intimate companion and among the righteous ones devoted to you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای برادران مهربان ناظم اخوی فی الحقیقه یار غار است و از زمره ابرار بهر شما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
